description: Create and deploy a 'Patient Admission Channel' in NextGen Connect Integration Engine that accepts HL7 v2.x messages on TCP port 6661 using MLLP framing and writes received messages to /tmp/hl7_output/. Use the REST API at https://localhost:8443/api (admin/admin) with the 'X-Requested-With: OpenAPI' header. The channel XML must include a <responseTransformer> element in destination connectors. The web dashboard at https://localhost:8443 is available for monitoring only.
